title: dLLM Diffusion Roadmap
body:
## Diffusion Model Support Roadmap

- [x] Flux support
- [x] Wan 2.0 text-to-video
- [ ] Wan 2.1 improvements
- [ ] Hunyuan video generation #1234
- [x] Qwen image generation
- [ ] CogVideo support
- [ ] Stable Diffusion 3.5
- [x] Multi-GPU pipeline parallelism
- [ ] LoRA adapter support
- [ ] Quantization (INT8/FP8)
